on_screen_text:
Priya yaar... 😔 [Priya, my friend... 😔]

Aaj neha ne mujhe reject kar diya [Today Neha rejected me]

Maine bola "i am loving since long time" [I said "i am loving since long time"]

Usne hans k bola "pehle English sikh lo" [She laughed and said "learn English first"]

Dost bhi the waha pe... Bahut beizzati hui 😭 [Friends were also there... It was very embarrassing 😭]

Arjun, haar mat maan ✨ [Arjun, don't lose hope ✨]

Maine bhi pehle teri jaisi English boli thi [I also used to speak English like you before]

Par MySivi app use karke sab badal gaya [But using the MySivi app changed everything]

MySivi??? 🤨 [MySivi??? 🤨]

Haan! Yahan AI teacher Arya hai [Yes! There is an AI teacher Arya here]

Roz bas 15 minute usse baat karo, bilkul dost ki tarah [Just talk to her for 15 minutes daily, just like a friend]

Galti hui? Judge nahi karti, sirf correct karti hai [Made a mistake? She doesn't judge, she only corrects you]

Matlab ab bhi hope hai?? 🥺 [So there is still hope?? 🥺]

Bilkul! 💪 [Absolutely! 💪]

2 hafte practice kar... teri English itni improve hogi ki Neha khud impressed ho jayegi [Practice for 2 weeks... your English will improve so much that Neha herself will be impressed]

Par ye toh expensive hoga na? [But this must be expensive, right?]

nhi, Sirf ₹1! [No, just ₹1!]

Wow! 🙌 [Wow! 🙌]

Mai bhi abhi download karta hu [I am downloading it right now]

2 hafte baad neha ko perfect English me propose karunga 😈 [After 2 weeks, I will propose to Neha in perfect English 😈]

All the best! MySivi download kar aur shuru ho ja 💖 [All the best! Download MySivi and get started 💖]

Great! Download MySivi. I'll see you there!
summary: The ad features a simulated WhatsApp conversation where a user named Arjun shares his embarrassment after being rejected for his poor English. His friend Priya recommends the MySivi app, explaining how its AI teacher, Arya, helps users practice English in a judgment-free environment for just ₹1. Arjun is motivated to download the app to improve his English and try again.
